text:
Created attachment 207892
Diff of 1.0.3 to 1.0.4

Update of headers to URDF to 1.0.4 (URDF is still at 1.0.3), but it seems there was a missing include.

Changelog is here:

https://github.com/ros/urdfdom_headers/releases/tag/1.0.4

Simple version number bump.
